lessons.title: What is OSINT? 🔍
lessons.description: Open Source Intelligence: The legal art of turning public data into attack vectors.

lessons.title: Google Dorking & Search Operators 🤖
lessons.description: Become a search engine ninja. Find exposed files, directories, and login panels.

lessons.title: Social Media Intelligence (SOCMINT) 📱
lessons.description: LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram—every post is a piece of the puzzle.

lessons.title: Corporate & Financial OSINT 🏢
lessons.description: Job postings, SEC filings, and breach databases—the corporate blueprint exposed.

lessons.title: Crafting the Perfect Pretext 🎭
lessons.description: Turning OSINT into a character. Who are you, and why should they trust you?

lessons.title: Advanced Pretext Management 🧩
lessons.description: Handling curveball questions, maintaining consistency, and graceful exits.
